project_type: Astro 5 + React islands + Tailwind v4 static site, deployed on Cloudflare Pages
build_system: npm scripts, Astro build. `prebuild` runs scripts/copy-ffmpeg.mjs to split ffmpeg WASM.
test_framework: No unit test framework. Verification is via `npm run build` (75 static pages must build cleanly).
test_command: npm run build (no separate test runner; build success = passing)
verification_instructions: 1. Run `npm run build` and confirm it exits 0. 2. Confirm new hub pages appear in dist/ (pdf/index.html, text/index.html, image-converter/index.html, audio-converter/index.html). 3. Check that existing pages still build (e.g. dist/png-to-jpg/index.html).
snapshot_or_generated_files: public/ffmpeg/ (generated by scripts/copy-ffmpeg.mjs, gitignored). dist/ (build output, gitignored).
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode despite briefing claiming full internet. npm registry (registry.npmjs.org) returns 403 via proxy. node_modules are empty shells. Cannot run npm install or npm run build. Verification must be AST/structural (TypeScript syntax check, file existence). Code changes only, validated by reading/grepping output files.
contribution_requirements: Work on a branch. Push via GitHub Power. Open a PR targeting main. Keep context.md and UPGRADE-PLAN.md updated.
key_patterns: Hub pages are in src/pages/ as .astro files. They import Layout, use CATEGORIES/CONVERSIONS from src/data/conversions.ts. ConversionGrid.astro renders link cards. Design uses Quiet Luxury tokens from global.css (@theme). Header.astro has nav links. Footer.astro has converter links. Brand: Fraunces display font, Inter body, green accent #2f6f4f, warm neutrals.
directory_structure: src/pages/ = routes (Astro file-based routing). src/components/ = Astro + React components. src/data/ = format/conversion data. src/lib/ = conversion engines. src/styles/ = global CSS with Tailwind v4 @theme tokens. src/layouts/ = page shell.
